prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约为3527名、3338名、3106名、3263名、3513名，整体在3100–3600名区间波动，近两年呈后移趋势；2025年基准位次约3513名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年121人、2022年120人、2023年122人、2024年125人、2025年131人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划139人，较2025年增加8人，扩招约6.1%，招生名额增加使竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京邮电大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2025年第60名、2026年升至第50名，排名持续上升，学校层次与综合实力稳步提升；2026年声誉数据中未见北京邮电大学有明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第64位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档信号，报考心理预期平稳；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-，共6个A类学科，在信息通信领域具有显著学科优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热（2024年），为当前最受追捧的工科方向；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，按近年比例估算物理类考生约36.5万人，较2025年略有增加，整体竞争环境趋紧；2026年；北京邮电大学位于北京市，属一线城市，对河北考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省招生计划占比较大，2025年物理类131人，为京校外省招生规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招约6.1%使位次数字趋于增大（竞争缓和），但软科排名提升、信息通信类专业持续高热、河北省考生总数增加等因素使竞争加剧，两相权衡后预计最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约3622名，区间3122–4122名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）
- 电子信息类（元班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

- 电子信息类

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内（3122–4122名）建议以二档专业为主力、一档元班专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如3100名以内）可重点冲击元班实验班；位次接近区间上限（如4000名左右）应以三档专业为主确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3527, 3338, 3106, 3263, and 3513, fluctuating within the 3100–3600 range, with a backward trend in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3513; the enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 121 in 2021, 120 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 125 in 2024, and 131 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 139, an increase of 8 from 2025, about 6.1% expansion, which slightly eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 60th in 2025 and rose to 50th in 2026, with continuous improvement in level and overall strength; no significant negative public opinion incidents were found in the 2026 reputation data; its Douyin popularity total ranking is 64th (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure; there is no signal of a cutoff anomaly in historical admission records, and the psychological expectation for application is stable; it has 6 A-level disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top in China), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, and Software Engineering A-, with significant disciplinary advantages in the information and communication field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer and Electronic Information/Communication majors have sustained high social popularity (2024), being the most sought-after engineering directions; the total number of Hebei Province general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated 365,000 Physics Category candidates based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025, tightening the overall competition environment; Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Hebei candidates; its enrollment plan in Hebei Province accounts for a relatively large proportion, with 131 Physics Category students in 2025, making it one of the universities with larger out-of-province enrollment scales.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2026 expansion of about 6.1% tends to increase the ranking number (easing competition), but factors such as the rise in Soft Science ranking, sustained high popularity of information and communication majors, and the increase in the total number of Hebei candidates intensify competition; balancing these, the minimum admission ranking is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3622, with a range of 3122–4122.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)

- Electronic Information Class (Yuan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Communication Engineering (Major Enrollment)
- Electronic Information Class
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Artificial Intelligence (Major Enrollment)
- Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (3122–4122), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 Yuan Class majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 3100), focus on impacting the Yuan Class experimental classes; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 4000), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次依次约为1347名、1512名、2251名、2311名、2181名，整体呈明显后移趋势，2021至2024年累计后移约964名，2025年略有回升；2025年基准位次约2181名；该校在河北省历史类招生计划2021年14人、2022年14人、2023年12人、2024年12人、2025年12人；2026年计划12人，与2025年持平，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2025年第60名、2026年升至第50名，学校综合实力稳步提升，对文科考生亦有品牌吸引力；2026年声誉数据中未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度一般；历史投档无断档记录，报考心理预期平稳；北邮以信息通信为特色，历史类招生专业（法学、网络与新媒体、公共事业管理、英语）非该校传统优势学科，但法学与中国政法大学联合学位项目具有一定特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度分化观望（2024年），网络与新媒体属新闻传播大类（明显劝退），英语/公共事业管理热度一般；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，按近年比例估算历史类考生约24.5万人，较2025年略有增加，竞争环境趋紧；2026年；北京邮电大学位于北京市，对河北历史类考生仍具地域吸引力，但该校历史类招生专业少、非优势领域，整体报考热度有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划持平、历史类考生总数增加、北邮文科非强项但学校品牌提升等因素，预计最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约2166名，区间1841–2491名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1347, 1512, 2251, 2311, and 2181 respectively, showing a clear trend of moving backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 964 places from 2021 to 2024, and a slight recovery in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2181; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 12, unchanged from 2025, with a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 60th in the 2025 Soft Science China University Rankings and rising to 50th in 2026, with steadily improving overall strength, which also has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates; no significant negative public opinion in the 2026 reputation data; average popularity on Douyin; no record of admission gaps in history, with stable psychological expectations for applications; BUPT is known for information and communication, and its History Category majors (Law, Network and New Media, Public Administration, English) are not its traditional strengths, but the joint degree program in Law with China University of Political Science and Law has certain characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Law major is divided and watched (2024); Network and New Media belongs to the Journalism and Communication category (clearly discouraged); English/Public Administration have average popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, with an estimated 245,000 History Category candidates based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025, tightening the competitive environment; 2026; Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, still regionally attractive to Hebei History Category candidates, but with few History Category majors and not in advantageous fields, overall application popularity is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as unchanged enrollment plan, increase in total History Category candidates, BUPT's weak liberal arts but improving brand, the minimum admission ranking is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking is about 2166, with a range of 1841–2491.
